turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 86-337, Burlington Northern Railroad Company vs. Oklahoma Tax Commission will be announced by Justice Marshall.

turns.name: THURGOOD MARSHALL
turns.text: In this case which comes to us on certiorari from the United States Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit, the Court of Appeals held that the Railroad Revitalization and Regulatory Reform Act of 1976 does not permit railroads to challenge in Federal Courts allegedly discriminatory state taxation based upon overevaluation of railroad property. For the reasons stated in an opinion today, we reverse the Court of Appeals.
